reviews.review_description:
I like little quirky puzzle games. I wanted to like this one. But nothing worked properly. Grabbing things was hit or miss, the ball control often didn’t work at all and when it did it was way too hard to control with that big virtual joystick. But worst of all, the Draw It part of Draw It was glitchy and horrible. It worked maybe 20 % of the time and even when it did, it was so jerky you couldn’t be accurate drawing paths for the ball. Literally nothing worked in this game. 
I like the idea, but man, it’s basically unplayable now. 
Sorry devs. Not sure if you gave up on this game or not, but if you’re still working on it, pull a few all-nighters and revamp everything.

Good luck.
I was expecting a drawing app, and not a little "hand physics lab". It´s quite cheap, but it was a waste of money anyway.
